mainEntity.name: Tax implications of workers comp settlement Bountiful?
mainEntity.text: Tax implications of workers comp settlement Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: Benefits tax-free; structured settlements may have portions taxed if interest.

suggestedAnswer.text: Bountiful: lump sums nontaxable for comp. Attorney structures tax-free; IRS audits common—consult tax pro.

name: Taxes on Settlements Bountiful
description: Benefits tax-free; structured settlements may have portions taxed if interest.
